channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INDRANIB] Indrayani Biotech Fixes Record Date for Partly Paid-up Rights Issue on 28th April, 2026
item.description:
Indrayani Biotech Ltd has announced the fixation of the Record Date for the Partly Paid-up Rights Issue. The Record Date has been set as 28th April, 2026. The Rights Issue Committee of the Board of Directors of the Company made this decision in a meeting held on an unspecified date. The purpose of this Record Date is to determine the equity shareholders entitled to receive the rights entitlement in the Rights Issue. The Rights Issue details include a total of 3,25,25,897 Rights Equity Shares, an issue price of ₹15 per Rights Equity Share, and a Rights Entitlement Ratio of 5 Rights Equity Shares for every 7 fully paid-up equity shares of the Company held by the Eligible Equity Shareholders.

  • Record Date for Partly Paid-up Rights Issue fixed as 28th April, 2026
  • Total Number of Rights Equity Shares: 3,25,25,897
  • Issue Price: ₹15 per Rights Equity Share
  • Rights Entitlement Ratio: 5 Rights Equity Shares for every 7 fully paid-up equity shares of the Company held by the Eligible Equity Shareholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAYANI BIOTECH LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd: No Material Information Behind Price Movement
item.description:
Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd has clarified that there is no material information or event that may have a bearing on the price movement of its securities. The company is in compliance with the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 and has been promptly intimating all material and price sensitive information to the Stock Exchange. The movement in the share price is purely market driven.

  • Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd is not aware of any material information or event that may have a bearing on the price movement of its securities
  • The company is in compliance with the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
  • Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd has been promptly intimating all material and price sensitive information to the Stock Exchange
  • The movement in the share price is purely market driven
  • Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd will continue to keep the Stock Exchange informed of any material events as required under applicable regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [INDRANIB] Indrayani Biotech Ltd. Announces Rights Issue of ₹49.90 Crore with 5:7 Rights Entitlement Ratio
item.description:
Indrayani Biotech Ltd. has announced the outcome of the Rights Issue Committee Meeting held on 09-04-2026. The committee has approved the terms of the Rights Issue, which includes the issuance of 3,25,25,897 equity shares at a price of ₹15 per share (including a premium of ₹5 per share), amounting to ₹49.90 crore. The record date for the Rights Issue is Tuesday, 28-04-2026, and the Rights Issue period is from 27-05-2026 to 25-06-2026. The rights entitlement ratio is 5 Rights Equity Shares for every 7 fully paid-up equity shares held by the Eligible Equity Shareholders as on the record date. The company has made arrangements with NSDL and CDSL for the credits of the rights entitlements in dematerialized form in the demat account of the Eligible Equity Shareholders.

  • Indrayani Biotech Ltd. announces a Rights Issue of ₹49.90 crore
  • Issuance of 3,25,25,897 equity shares at a price of ₹15 per share
  • Rights entitlement ratio is 5:7
  • Record date is Tuesday, 28-04-2026
  • Rights Issue period is from 27-05-2026 to 25-06-2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAYANI BIOTECH LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [INDRANIB] Indrayani Biotech Ltd. Announces Rights Issue of ₹49.90 Crore with 5:7 Ratio
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indrayani Biotech Ltd. has announced the outcome of its Rights Issue Committee Meeting held on 9th April, 2026. The committee has approved the terms of the Rights Issue, which includes the issuance of 3,25,25,897 equity shares at a price of ₹15 per share (including a premium of ₹5 per share), amounting to ₹49.90 crore. The record date for the Rights Issue is Tuesday, 28th April, 2026, and the Rights Issue period begins on Wednesday, 27th May, 2026, and ends on Thursday, 25th June, 2026. The rights entitlement ratio is 5 Rights Equity Shares for every 7 fully paid-up equity shares held by the eligible equity shareholders as on the record date. The arrangement for the credits of the rights entitlements has been made with NSDL and CDSL for the credits of the rights entitlements with a separate ISIN in dematerialized form in the demat account of the Eligible Equity Shareholders against the equity shares held by them as on the Record Date.

  • Indrayani Biotech Ltd. announces a Rights Issue of ₹49.90 crore
  • Issuance of 3,25,25,897 equity shares at a price of ₹15 per share
  • Rights entitlement ratio is 5:7
  • Record date is Tuesday, 28th April, 2026
  • Rights Issue period is from 27th May to 25th June, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAYANI BIOTECH LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital Ltd Receives Open Offer from Avenir Investment RSC Ltd and IHC Capital Holding LLC
item.description:
Sammaan Capital Ltd has received a letter of offer from Avenir Investment RSC Ltd, a restricted scope company incorporated under the laws of the United Arab Emirates, and IHC Capital Holding LLC, a limited liability company incorporated under the laws of United Arab Emirates. The companies are offering to acquire up to 34,17,54,286 Equity Shares representing 26.05% of the expanded voting share capital of Sammaan Capital Ltd at a price of INR 139 per fully paid Equity Share and INR 39 per partly paid Equity Share.

  • Avenir Investment RSC Ltd and IHC Capital Holding LLC make a cash offer for Sammaan Capital Ltd's Equity Shares.
  • The offer price is INR 139 per fully paid Equity Share and INR 39 per partly paid Equity Share.
  • The companies aim to acquire up to 34,17,54,286 Equity Shares, representing 26.05% of the expanded voting share capital.
  • The offer is in accordance with the SEBI (SAST) Regulations.
  • Sammaan Capital Ltd shareholders are advised to read and consider the information before taking any action.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [FRUTION] Fruition Venture Ltd: Promoter Group Confirms Zero Encumbrance on Shares
item.description:
In a recent disclosure under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, the Promoter Group of Fruition Venture Limited, including Nitin Aggarwal, Krishan Kumar, and Aayush, have declared and confirmed that all their equity shares in the company are free from any encumbrance. The declaration, signed digitally on 09-04-2026, also confirms that no encumbrance has been created on the shares other than those disclosed, and any future changes will be promptly intimated to the Company.

  • Promoter Group confirms zero encumbrance on shares
  • Declaration made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011
  • Includes Nitin Aggarwal, Krishan Kumar, and Aayush
  • Future changes in encumbrance status to be promptly intimated to the Company
  • Signed digitally on 09-04-2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fruition Venture Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TCS] Tata Consultancy Services Ltd Releases Q4 and FY26 Earnings Conference Call Audio
item.description:
Tata Consultancy Services Ltd has released the audio recording of its earnings conference call for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The results were approved at the Board meeting held on April 9, 2026. The audio recording is now available on the company's investor relations website.

  • Tata Consultancy Services Ltd has released the audio recording of its earnings conference call for Q4 and FY26.
  • The results were approved at the Board meeting on April 9, 2026.
  • The audio recording is available on the company's investor relations website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TEJASNET] Tejas Networks Ltd to Announce Q4FY26 Financial Results on April 15, 2026
item.description:
Tejas Networks Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on April 15, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for the earning release of the quarter ended March 31, 2026, is closed from March 17, 2026, to April 17, 2026. The company will hold an Investor/Analyst call on April 15, 2026, to discuss the financial results.

  • Tejas Networks Ltd scheduled Board Meeting on April 15, 2026, to approve Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window for the earning release of the quarter ended March 31, 2026, is closed from March 17, 2026, to April 17, 2026.
  • Company will hold Investor/Analyst call on April 15, 2026, to discuss the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tejas Networks Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AIRFLOA] Airfloa Rail Technology Reports 64% YoY Growth in FY26, Eyes Expansion in Defence and Aerospace
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Airfloa Rail Technology Limited (BSE: AIRFLOA) has reported a topline of more than ₹315.00 crore for FY26, reflecting a growth of almost ~64% YoY. The growth is supported by strong order inflows and execution across railway, Defense, Renewable energy and emerging segments. The Company is in the process of forming a Joint Venture with Big Bang Boom Solutions (BBBS) to enter into electronic warfare, AI-led defence systems, and advanced materials. Airfloa is also focusing on execution efficiency, project delivery, and strengthened customer engagement.

  • FY26 topline of more than ₹315.00 crore, reflecting a growth of almost ~64% YoY
  • Unexecuted order book of ~₹500 crore and active order pipeline of ~₹236 crore
  • Participated in ₹1,350 crore worth of tenders
  • In the process of forming a Joint Venture with Big Bang Boom Solutions (BBBS) for defence manufacturing
  • Signed MoU with Janatics Industrial Automation for automatic door systems

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [CENTURYTEX] Aditya Birla Real Estate to Redeem Rs. 250 Crores Debentures Early
item.description:
Aditya Birla Real Estate Ltd. has announced the exercise of a call option for early redemption of Rs. 250 crores worth of 8.05% Unsecured, Listed, Rated, Senior, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures. The company will redeem 25,000 debentures of face value Rs. 1,00,000 each on May 4, 2026. The record date for the purpose of early redemption has been fixed as April 17, 2026. The decision is in compliance with the SEBI Listing Regulations, SEBI NCS Regulations, and the SEBI Master Circular.

  • Aditya Birla Real Estate to redeem Rs. 250 crores debentures early
  • Exercise of call option for 8.05% Unsecured, Listed, Rated, Senior, Redeemable, Non-Convertible Debentures
  • Redemption of 25,000 debentures of face value Rs. 1,00,000 each
  • Record date for early redemption fixed as April 17, 2026
  • Compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations, SEBI NCS Regulations, and SEBI Master Circular

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTURY TEXTILES & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Redemption
